title: TASTE LAŠKO - OKUSITI LAŠKO / SLOVENIA
subtitle: GET INSPIRED! A ROADMAP TO REPLICATE KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ABOUT FAIR FOOD SUPPLY CHAINS
description: A roadmap presenting the Taste Laško initiative in Slovenia as a best practice for establishing fair food supply chains. It outlines a public-private partnership model that links tourism, agriculture, and crafts to empower small food producers and enhance regional competitiveness.
